trade.summary: Moderate bilateral trade. Switzerland exports pharmaceuticals, machinery, and watches. Thailand exports electronics, food products (especially rice and seafood), and rubber. EFTA-Thailand FTA negotiations have been under discussion.

diplomatic.summary: Stable and cordial relations. Switzerland and Thailand have maintained diplomatic ties since the 19th century. Switzerland provides development cooperation in Thailand and has hosted Thai political figures during periods of political turmoil. Cultural and tourism ties are active.

military.summary: No military alliance or significant defense cooperation. Switzerland's neutrality precludes formal military ties. Some Swiss defense equipment used by Thai forces.

financial.summary: Moderate bilateral investment. Swiss multinationals (Nestlé, Novartis) have significant Thailand operations. Swiss banks manage Thai private wealth. Thailand uses Swiss financial centers for international transactions.

energy.summary: Very limited direct energy trade. Switzerland supports Thailand's renewable energy development through technical assistance.

scientific.summary: Modest scientific cooperation in tropical medicine, agriculture, and materials science. Some university exchange programs. Joint publications growing slowly.
